attacking_style: Goes early in breakaway formations, capable of sustaining long-range efforts to hold off chasers by significant margins (2+ minutes).
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Unknown specific terrain from available data, though demonstrated ability to defend breakaway advantages over quality climbers.
vulnerability: Theoretical fatigue risk from Grand Tour doubles proved unfounded; actual vulnerabilities not exposed in observed performance.
key_patterns: Capable of racing double Grand Tours in same season without significant form loss
Willing to commit to early breakaway moves rather than waiting for selective moments
Can time trial effectively enough to hold 2+ minute advantages to finish
form_trajectory: positive: defied fatigue expectations racing Tour post-Giro, won stage and took yellow jersey
